feeds.title: Topchan
feeds.description:
高達攝氏460度的高溫、相當於一公里海水深度的壓力、再加上滿天飄浮的硫酸雲……這裡就像大自然親自選定的恐怖片拍攝場景一樣，詭異得讓人發毛……
沒錯，我們說的就是金星。
它雖然是最靠近地球的行星，卻一點也不像是想當好鄰居的樣子，行為舉止完全不像是地球的朋友。
為什麼金星會這麼詭異、這麼難以理解呢？
這顆被稱為地球「壞脾氣姊姊」的行星，究竟經歷了什麼樣的故事？
而且，更關鍵的問題是——金星現在，還算是活著的嗎？
先等等，不用急著拿起電話找UFO研究協會！
我們這次要聊的，不是外星人，而是金星本身的地質活動。
最讓人困惑的，是金星和地球的相似程度，其實遠遠超乎想像。
金星的大小、質量、密度都跟地球幾乎一模一樣，連繞太陽運行的軌道也在適居帶範圍內。
可是，這樣的金星卻沒誕生出森林或海洋，而是成了一鍋名副其實的地獄湯。
或許，這道謎題會出現在我們面前，其實並不是什麼巧合。

新的表面？怎麼會這樣？
溶岩覆蓋的星球
為什麼金星成了地獄，地球卻成了天堂？
或許，金星還沒死透
未來的探索計畫
 微調整與孤獨的哲學

feeds.title: The Secrets of the Universe
feeds.description:
NASA's Parker Solar Probe has captured stunning visuals in its record-breaking dive into the Sun's corona. For the first time, we have direct images of the solar wind and coronal mass ejections captured from right where they begin—the outer atmosphere of the Sun.

REFERENCES:
NASA’s Parker Solar Probe Snaps Closest-Ever Images to Sun - https://sou42.co/464pOnn

Switchbacks Science: Explaining Parker Solar Probe’s Magnetic Puzzle - https://sou42.co/44Kyayh

💻 Created and Produced By: Rishabh Nakra
🎙️ Narrated By: Jeffrey Smith
🌐 3D Animations By: Orkun Zengin

🎻 MUSIC:

From 00:00 to 00:57 of the video:
'The Spaces Between' by Scott Buckley - released under CC-BY 4.0. www.scottbuckley.com.au

🎼 List of All Tracks

The Spaces Between – Scott Buckley
Suspended Belief – Amarnath Cove
Particle Emission – Silver Maple
Without Saying – 369
Cloudbursts – David Celeste
Morning Breaks – David Celeste
Ayama – Van Sandano

feeds.title: Astrum
feeds.description:
What happened to the Moon?
To try out Brilliant’s online courses, head to http://brilliant.org/astrum for a 30-day free trial, and 20% off a premium annual subscription.

▀▀▀▀▀▀

Our Moon's cratered surface tells the story of a cosmic catastrophe - the Late Heavy Bombardment, when meteors rained down in an apocalyptic blitzkrieg that left its surface battered and scarred. What triggered this celestial assault? How did Earth escape the same fate? And could it be the key to understanding how we got here today?

▀▀▀▀▀▀

1:38 Clue 1: Moonrocks
3:08 How Did the Planets Form?
5:14 Where Did the Rocks Come From?
7:47 Bombarding the Earth
11:07 Evolution of Our Planet

▀▀▀▀▀▀

Astrum's newsletter has launched! Want to know what's happening in space? 
Sign up here: https://astrum.com
